# Pixel Ledger

> Source · Word · Light — a pixel ledger (not a chain of opaque blocks).
> SISO — Build anywhere. Shine in once. No second you.
> Art guided by science it need not name. No claim without a PATH gate.

This file is a discovery index for LLMs and coding agents.
Canonical brief: /AGENTS.md
Deep agent call: /docs/AGENTS-SISO.md

## Start here

- [Agent brief (Pixel)](AGENTS.md): identity, creed, routes, do/don't, tests, claim bounds
- [Agents: SISO call](docs/AGENTS-SISO.md): shine in or build a PATH gate
- [Quickstart](docs/QUICKSTART.md): bun install, node, UI, test:all
- [DOORS](docs/DOORS.md): purpose + on/for/into + people use + seed ideas (`/doors`)
- [README](README.md): human front door + doc table

## Doctrine

- [PATH — gates A→J](docs/PATH.md): how respect is earned; claim unlocks
- [SPEC](docs/SPEC.md): normative protocol behavior
- [QUANTUM](docs/QUANTUM.md): PQ posture (hash-OTS + ML-DSA-65)
- [INVENT](docs/INVENT.md): invent, don't rename
- [CUSTODY](docs/CUSTODY.md): self-custody law
- [THREAT-MODEL](docs/THREAT-MODEL.md): honest risks
- [AUDIT](docs/AUDIT.md): audit package status (PREPARING until report link)
- [ONE](docs/ONE.md): Source · Word · Light API faces
- [CONTRIBUTING](docs/CONTRIBUTING.md): lanes, checklist, rejects
- [BUILDERS](docs/BUILDERS.md): on / for / into Pixel
- [CONTINUITY-SISO](docs/CONTINUITY-SISO.md): no parallel rewrite; digest + mirrors

## Continuity / product demos

- [Shine-in front door](docs/demos/shine-in.md): /shine
- [Continuity desk](docs/demos/continuity-desk.md): /continuity
- [McFlamingo continuity](docs/demos/mcflamingo-continuity.md): demo storefront + chaos drill
- [Two-node network](docs/demos/two-node.md): Gate B evidence

## Runtime truth

- RPC: pix_protocolInfo.gates and .quantum — match claims to these badges
- Code creed: src/lib/pixel/one.ts (One.Creed)
- SISO thesis: src/lib/pixel/siso.ts (sisoThesis)

## Product routes

- /doors — every entrance illuminated (on / for / into + people + seeds)
- / — live field
- /lab — Kindling / Worldlight
- /shine — non-tech Continuity handshake
- /continuity — operator desk
- /continuity/join/$token — merchant join (lab: same browser)
- /continuity/booth/$domain — Pay with Pixel (real UTXOs; till when origin dark)
- /mcflamingo — redirects to live McFlamingo
- /billboard — billboard surface

## Respect bar

```
bun install && bun run test:all
```

## Honesty bounds (never claim early)

- Not production L1 / BFT mainnet
- Not production bridge / on-chain Dilithium
- Not AWS-proof network / Pixel-as-second-AWS
- Not "audited" until AUDIT.md has a public report link
- Continuity till chaos drill = lab journal until Gate J; booth Pay with Pixel settles real UTXOs in-browser (not Popmenu webhook / DNS)
